query:
SELECT 
  id,
  receipt_no,
  amount,
  paid_at,
  created_at,
  updated_by,
  CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(raw_json, '$.bad_debt_amount') AS DECIMAL(18,2)) AS raw_bad_debt_amount
FROM payment_transactions
WHERE contract_external_id = '19654' AND section = 'Fastfone365';
